request.prompt: Create one classroom-safe educational image about What Did We Learn Today?. Subject: Science (086). Grade level: Class X / 10. Topic focus: Summary of Life Processes. Must show visually: - Life processes are essential for survival (Nutrition, Respiration, etc.).; - **Autotrophs** make food; **Heterotrophs** consume it.; - **Photosynthesis**: Plants use Sun + Water + CO2 to make Food + O2.; - **Respiration**: Lungs exchange gases (O2 in, CO2 out) via alveoli.. Visual goal: Clean summary slide with icons representing each key point (Leaf, Sun, Lung, Checkmark).. Teaching context: Consolidate learning and ensure students can recall the main points.. Student takeaway: Recap of definitions, nutrition types, photosynthesis equation, and respiration pathway.. Show the scientific or educational concept itself, not a presentation slide about the concept. Do not draw a slide, visual panel, titl...
